commands.summary: TypeScript compiled successfully under Hermes-managed Node v22.22.3.
Focused finance store tests passed: 4 tests in 1 file.

All 717 collected assertions passed and finance tests passed, but the repo-wide Vitest command exited non-zero because of pre-existing collection/config debt: three e2e specs require missing @playwright/test and two services/odysseus TAP .mjs files expose no Vitest suite.

Repo-wide lint has existing baseline debt: 213 errors and 102 warnings, including unrelated import-order, strict no-unnecessary-condition, missing react-hooks plugin, and regex warnings outside this finance change.

commands.command: npx eslint --no-warn-ignored -f json --rule '@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition: off' <changed finance/navigation files>
